title: `--coverage` triggers complaints for certain ternary assignments.

features.name: ternary with unary operator in else branch under coverage
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator assignment where the else branch applies a unary operator to a signal, used under coverage instrumentation
features.snippet: logic [15:0] csum; wire [15:0] result = csum == 16'hFFFF ? csum : ~csum;
